content.description:
Vendored [morphdom v2.7.4](https://github.com/patrick-steele-idem/morphdom) — a fast, lightweight DOM diffing/patching library.

Used by the rendering system to reconcile Hob view re-renders in-place (preserving focus, selection, scroll position) instead of wholesale DOM replacement.

Exports a single function: `morphdom(fromNode, toNode, options?)` → `HTMLElement`.

toElement.name: toElement

compareNodeNames.name: compareNodeNames
compareNodeNames.description:
Returns true if two node's names are the same.

NOTE: We don't bother checking `namespaceURI` because you will never find two HTML elements with the same
      nodeName and different namespace URIs.

createElementNS.name: createElementNS
createElementNS.description: Create an element, optionally with a known namespace URI.

params.name: namespaceURI
params.description: the element's namespace URI, i.e. the value of

moveChildren.name: moveChildren
moveChildren.description: Copies the children of one DOM element to another DOM element

specialElHandlers.INPUT.name: INPUT
specialElHandlers.INPUT.description:
The "value" attribute is special for the <input> element since it sets
the initial value. Changing the "value" attribute without changing the
"value" property will have no effect since it is only used to the set the
initial value.  Similar for the "checked" attribute, and "disabled".

morphdomFactory.removeNode.name: removeNode
morphdomFactory.removeNode.description: Removes a DOM node out of the original DOM

params.name: skipKeyedNodes
params.description: If true then elements with keys will be skipped and not discarded.
